svg.title: Plotterbench test card 04 — PEN LIFT COMB
svg.desc: Plotter QA diagnostic. Units = mm. Plot identically on every machine; grade by physical measurement.

g.text: pen up/down between disjoint paths · servo timing
240 separate strokes — each needs a clean pen lift
dot row — fast pen toggling; look for missing/ghost dots
stroke starts must touch their intended start (late drop = gap; late lift = drag)
